method_i36uz0nmt_mo156c3f_xbq.name: + authenticate(password: str): bool
method_i36uz0nmt_mo156c3f_xbq.code:
def authenticate(self, password: str) -> bool:
    # Implement password verification logic here
    # For example, compare hashed password
    return verify_password_hash(password, self.passwordHash)  # assuming verify_password_hash is defined elsewhere

method_4k9zc5soj_mo15iald_opm.name: goToToDoList(listId: str)

method_r51e8ko15_mo156c3g_y99.name: + addTask(task: Task): any
method_r51e8ko15_mo156c3g_y99.code:
def addTask(self, task: Task) -> None:
    # Add task to the ToDoList
    self.tasks.append(task)
    self.updatedAt = datetime.now()  # assuming datetime is imported

components.content: Manage your ToDo lists and tasks with ease. Stay productive and never miss a deadline.

Tasks related to ongoing work projects. Manage your tasks below.
